item.title: Creating a Home Built for Memories and Milestones
item.description: A look at the building process behind a home designed for memories and milestones, with focus on craftsmanship, tools, and steady project progress. What details matter most in a home build?

media:content.media:title: Creating a Home Built for Memories and Milestones
media:content.media:description: A look at the building process behind a home designed for memories and milestones, with focus on craftsmanship, tools, and steady project progress. What details matter most in a home build?

item.title: Let's Make Room for the Kitchen - Episode 2
item.description: A kitchen renovation moves forward as the team makes room for the new layout. This episode focuses on the building process and site progress. What comes next?

media:content.media:title: Let's Make Room for the Kitchen - Episode 2
media:content.media:description: A kitchen renovation moves forward as the team makes room for the new layout. This episode focuses on the building process and site progress. What comes next?

item.title: Building a Dream Home
item.description: A look at the building process behind a dream home, with focus on craftsmanship, tools, and steady project progress. What part of the build would you want to see next?

media:content.media:title: Building a Dream Home
media:content.media:description: A look at the building process behind a dream home, with focus on craftsmanship, tools, and steady project progress. What part of the build would you want to see next?

item.title: Getting Stuck In With Concrete Footings
item.description: A practical look at concrete footing work on the job site, focusing on the build process and hands-on progress. What comes next after the footings are set?

media:content.media:title: Getting Stuck In With Concrete Footings
media:content.media:description: A practical look at concrete footing work on the job site, focusing on the build process and hands-on progress. What comes next after the footings are set?

item.title: Some Tools Are Just Too Good To Throw Out
item.description: Old, worn, or forgotten tools get a second look as craftsmanship and practicality prove their value over time. Which tools are simply too useful to replace?

media:content.media:title: Some Tools Are Just Too Good To Throw Out
media:content.media:description: Old, worn, or forgotten tools get a second look as craftsmanship and practicality prove their value over time. Which tools are simply too useful to replace?

item.title: How to Install Door Knobs | Cabin Build
item.description: A step-by-step look at fitting door knobs during a cabin build, focusing on alignment, function, and finishing details. What makes for a smooth, professional installation?

media:content.media:title: How to Install Door Knobs | Cabin Build
media:content.media:description: A step-by-step look at fitting door knobs during a cabin build, focusing on alignment, function, and finishing details. What makes for a smooth, professional installation?

item.title: What Your House Is Built On
item.description: A closer look at the structural systems that support a home, from footings to foundations and everything in between. What makes a strong foundation last for generations?

media:content.media:title: What Your House Is Built On
media:content.media:description: A closer look at the structural systems that support a home, from footings to foundations and everything in between. What makes a strong foundation last for generations?

item.title: 100-Year-Old House Air Sealing Tips & Tricks
item.description: Practical techniques help improve comfort and energy efficiency in a century-old house by reducing unwanted air leaks. Where are the most common problem areas?

media:content.media:title: 100-Year-Old House Air Sealing Tips & Tricks
media:content.media:description: Practical techniques help improve comfort and energy efficiency in a century-old house by reducing unwanted air leaks. Where are the most common problem areas?

item.title: Roof Construction on a Mega Sized Modern Home
item.description: A massive modern home reaches a major milestone as roof construction begins to define the final shape of the structure. How much planning goes into a roof of this scale?

media:content.media:description: A massive modern home reaches a major milestone as roof construction begins to define the final shape of the structure. How much planning goes into a roof of this scale?

item.title: Steep Roof Work at Nantahala Retreat #12
item.description: Construction continues high above the ground as crews tackle roofing work on a challenging steep-pitch structure. What safety and skill are required for jobs like this?

media:content.media:description: Construction continues high above the ground as crews tackle roofing work on a challenging steep-pitch structure. What safety and skill are required for jobs like this?

item.title: Two Days of Laying Blocks in a Basement Build
item.description: Two productive days on site transform a basement foundation as rows of blocks steadily take shape. How much progress can be made in just 48 hours?

media:content.media:title: Two Days of Laying Blocks in a Basement Build
media:content.media:description: Two productive days on site transform a basement foundation as rows of blocks steadily take shape. How much progress can be made in just 48 hours?

item.title: The Best Window Trims: Joints That Never Gap
item.description: A carpentry technique focuses on creating window trim joints that stay tight and clean over time. What makes these joints resist gaps and movement?

media:content.media:title: The Best Window Trims: Joints That Never Gap
media:content.media:description: A carpentry technique focuses on creating window trim joints that stay tight and clean over time. What makes these joints resist gaps and movement?
